title: MosaPack Canonical Design JSON v1.1
$comment: Supersedes v1. Changes: (a) project_id is the storage UUID as-is, customer-facing proof_ref added; (b) palette entries are objects with STABLE ids (production keys on id, never name); (c) grid 32 / size 16 admitted (Gallery tier, half-inch stock compatible). Repo home: config/design-schema.v1.json — validated at save time. Generator-required subset: grid, size_in, project_id, palette, cell_map, black_base. production block is DERIVED: generator always recomputes from cell_map + constants and warns on mismatch with any stored copy.

project_id.$comment: Storage identity — the existing Blobs UUID, unchanged. Never shown to customers.

proof_ref.$comment: Customer-facing short code for emails, support, and PDF footers. Generated at save; recommended always present. PDFs fall back to a project_id prefix if absent.

size_in.$comment: One size per grid at launch, all on half-inch stock: 24->12, 32->16, 48->24. Loader MUST enforce size_in == grid/2. 18in shelved (no 3/8in die).

palette.$comment: ALWAYS embedded (self-contained designs survive palette evolution). Array order significant: cell_map values index this array. Optional index must equal the palette array position when present. Legacy [name,hex] pair arrays are accepted by the generator adapter but invalid under this schema — normalize on save.

cell_map.$comment: Length MUST equal grid*grid. Row-major from mosaic TOP-LEFT (R1C1 = index 0). Complete grid always — black-base cells INCLUDED.

black_base.$comment: true => cells whose palette entry id == constants.black_base.excluded_color_id ('ink_black') are pre-finished board; excluded from the sticker sequence only.

kit_format.$comment: magnet = waitlist-only until a production model exists.

production.$comment: DERIVED cache only. Generator recomputes from cell_map + config/production-constants.json, emits a non-fatal WARNING listing every mismatched field, and stamps its own computed values into PDF footers. Field definitions unchanged from v1.

source.$comment: Repo-owned proof-ops metadata (upload hash, crop params, artifact filenames). Unconstrained in v1.1 — surface actual fields via the schema diff.
